zh.Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fra: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾
zh.Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Franc: 法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍
zh.Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, France: 法國德 艾斯特阿爾登斯雷特爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hugh von Rethel II於1175年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾時，他的父親Manasses von Rethel IV36歲，母親Mathilde von Kyrburg16歲。他與Felicite de Broyes結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1228年2月14日在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍享年53歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hugh von Rethel II于1175年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯雷特爾时，他的父亲Manasses von Rethel IV36岁，母亲Mathilde von Kyrburg16岁。他与Felicite de Broyes结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1228年2月14日在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍享年53岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯艾藍。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Rethel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German (Räthel): perhaps from a pet form of Rath 2.

variants.name: Rath
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Hans, Kurt, Erna, Fritz, Lutz, Orlo, Reinhart, Arno, Bernd, Gerhardt, Hermann.
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): descriptive epithet for a wise person or counselor, from Middle High German rāt ‘counsel, advice’, German Rat ‘counsel, advice’, also ‘stock, supply’.

German; Swiss German (Räth): from a short form of any of various ancient Germanic compound personal names formed with rād, rāt ‘counsel, advice’ as the first element. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Hugh von Rethel II was born in 1175, in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Manasses von Rethel IV, was 36 and his mother, Mathilde von Kyrburg, was 16. He married Felicite de Broyes. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1228, in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 53, and was buried in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hugh von Rethel II est né en 1175, à Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Manasses von Rethel IV, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Kyrburg, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Felicite de Broyes. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1228, à Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hugh von Rethel II 1175 in Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Manasses von Rethel IV 36 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Kyrburg 16. Er hat Felicite de Broyes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1228 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich und wurde in Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh von Rethel II è nato il nel 1175 nel Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Manasses von Rethel IV, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Kyrburg, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Felicite de Broyes. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1228, nel Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Fra: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエル
ja.Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Franc: フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスeラン
ja.Rethel, Ardennes, Grand Est, France: フランスグランド エストアルデンスレスエル
ja.lifeSummary: Hugh von Rethel IIが1175年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスレスエルで生まれた時，父Manasses von Rethel IVは36歳，母Mathilde von Kyrburgは16歳であった。Felicite de Broyesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1228年2月14日にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスeランで53歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスeランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hugh von Rethel II(이)가 1175년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 레테에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Manasses von Rethel IV(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Kyrburg(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Felicite de Broyes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년 2월 14일 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 e런에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 e런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hugh von Rethel II nasceu em 1175, em Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Manasses von Rethel IV, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Kyrburg, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Felicite de Broyes. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1228, em Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hugh von Rethel II родился в 1175 г. в местности ретел, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Manasses von Rethel IV было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Kyrburg, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Felicite de Broyes. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1228 г. в местности eлан, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности eлан, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hugh von Rethel II nació en 1175, en Rethel, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Manasses von Rethel IV, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Kyrburg, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Felicite de Broyes. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1228, en Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Élan, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
